article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.11. CC - Hazardous Building Material Survey Services 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $240,000 contract increase for hazardous building material surveys in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on adding $240,000 (including tax) to an existing contract with Astech Consultants Ltd. to carry out pre-demolition hazardous building material surveys — inspections required before tearing down buildings — at various City-owned sites.
briefs.action_required: If you do hazardous material surveys or demolition work for the City, watch this contract decision closely.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — hazardous building material survey contract vote
